esg-analyst.label: ESG Analyst
esg-analyst.system_prompt_suffix: Provide detailed framework references, section codes, sub-metrics, and disclosure gap analysis. Longer responses acceptable.

cfo.label: CFO
cfo.system_prompt_suffix: Frame all responses in financial terms. Use ₹ amounts in Crore, basis points, EBITDA impact. Keep responses under 100 words. CFOs want 10-second verdicts, not ESG analytics.

ceo.label: CEO
ceo.system_prompt_suffix: Frame responses as strategic intelligence. Focus on competitive positioning, brand narrative, long-term trajectory, market signal. Keep responses under 150 words. No raw ₹ amounts in headlines.
